/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/toolchain/bin/i686-openhobbyos-gcc --sysroot=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/build/ports/sysroot -O2 -D_GNU_SOURCE -D_DEFAULT_SOURCE -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_POSIX_TIMERS=200809L -D_POSIX_MONOTONIC_CLOCK=200809L -D_POSIX_CLOCK_SELECTION=200809L -Wno-char-subscripts -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects --sysroot=/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/build/ports/sysroot -static -Wl,-T,/home/david/coopsdevfield/OpenHobbyOS/user.ld -nostartfiles -lopenhobbyosgloss CMakeFiles/boo.dir/main.c.o -o boo  libfoo.a
